name: Uses the terminology
summary: Implementer adopts the canonical layer names and layer numbering from SPEC.md when describing the system in documentation, slides or marketing.
requirements: Use the canonical layer names (Authority, Obligation, Control, EvidenceObject, ArchitectureRequirement, PolicyAsCode, AuditTrailLink, AuditPack, RiskScenario, Mitigation, Workflow, AiSystemGovernance, MonitorBinding) in user-facing material.
Use the 12-layer numbering published in SPEC.md when referencing the framework structure.
Do not introduce fabricated trademark, registered or copyright markers in user-facing strings.
manual_checks: Editor reviews documentation surface for canonical layer names.
Editor confirms the 12-layer numbering is preserved.
